requirements.prerequisite_background: An undergraduate degree in accounting, finance, business or economics is normally required. Applicants with an Honours degree in a non-related subject considered if they demonstrate a high standard of ability and motivation.
requirements.quantitative_requirement: Must have passed at least one quantitative-based module such as linear algebra, calculus, probability, or statistics; alternatively relevant work experience with a significant quantitative element.

ielts.raw: IELTS Academic: total 7.0 with at least 6.0 in each component

toefl.raw: TOEFL iBT (including Home Edition) before 21 January 2026: total 100 with at least 20 in each component. From 21 January 2026: total 5.0 with at least 4.0 in each component (new TOEFL scale).

requirements.gmat_gre: NOT MENTIONED ON OFFICIAL SITE — entry requirements page makes no reference to GMAT or GRE; appears not required, but no explicit statement found.
requirements.work_experience: Not required. 'Relevant work experience is not required but may increase your chances of acceptance.'
